config.generic.title: Generic
config.generic.enabled.title: Enabled
config.generic.enabled.tooltip: Enables or disables this mod completely
config.generic.alpha.title: Transparency of targets
config.generic.alpha.tooltip: Sets the transparency of invisible entities
config.generic.glow.title: Highlight invisible entities
config.generic.glow.tooltip:
Chosen targets gain glow effect when invisible.
None = No glow effect.
Players = Only players gain glow effect.
Targets = All targeted entities gain glow effect.
config.generic.targeted.title: Targets
config.generic.targeted.tooltip: Invisible entities that should be revealed
config.generic.targeted.all.title: All
config.generic.targeted.players.title: Players
config.generic.targeted.monster.title: Monsters
config.generic.targeted.villager.title: NPCs
config.generic.targeted.animals.title: Animals
config.generic.targeted.objects.title: Objects
config.generic.misc.title: Misc
config.generic.misc.expose_barriers.tool:
Will highlight barrier blocks without
the need to hold a barrier item or be
in Creative mode
config.generic.misc.name_tags.title: Force Render Name Tags
config.generic.misc.name_tags.tooltip:
Forces name tags to render.
Always = Force all name tags to render.
Sneaking = Render name tags of sneaking players.
None = Vanilla name tag rendering.
config.generic.misc.only_creative.title: Creative Only
config.generic.misc.only_creative.toolti: Enables the mod only when the player is in Creative mode
